# TCK-12: CI gate and auto-generated coverage matrix

## Parent Initiative

[[GQLITE-I-0037]]

## Objective

Lock in the conformance work by running TCK in CI with a regression gate, and replacing the hand-maintained coverage docs with files generated from `tck-results.json`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] CI workflow runs `angreal test tck` on every PR to `main` and on `main` itself.
- [ ] Gate: PR fails if pass count drops below `tests/tck/baseline.json` minus a small tolerance (default 0; tolerance configurable per backend if Rust/Python parity is still being stabilized).
- [ ] Updating the baseline requires a deliberate commit to `tests/tck/baseline.json` (no auto-bump on green runs).
- [ ] `docs/cypher-coverage-matrix.md` is generated by a script (`tools/gen-coverage-matrix.py` or angreal task) from `tck-results.json`; the file header says 'DO NOT EDIT — generated'.
- [ ] `docs/cypher-feature-checklist.md` is either also generated or explicitly marked as 'human notes, see coverage-matrix.md for measured truth'.
- [ ] README updated with a short conformance section linking to the latest baseline report.

## Implementation Notes

### Technical Approach
Final task — only after the audits land and the backlog is filed. Tolerance knob exists to avoid blocking unrelated PRs on TCK flakes; aim to drive tolerance to 0 quickly.

### Dependencies
Depends on every prior TCK task.

## Status Updates

*To be added during implementation*
